testcase.name: test_guard_cannot_delete_document
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_documentos_module.py:520: in test_guard_cannot_delete_document assert create_response.status_code == 200, f"Create failed: {create_response.text}" E AssertionError: Create failed: {"error":"Invalid or expired token","detail":"Invalid or expired token","request_id":"70a779e6-3e9e-485c-aaac-f5cb4cccf6a3"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_casos_endpoints_still_work
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_documentos_module.py:555: in test_casos_endpoints_still_work assert response.status_code == 200, f"Casos list failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Casos list failed: {"error":"Invalid or expired token","detail":"Invalid or expired token","request_id":"1c2b07e1-f0e5-40b3-9b4f-a28e899cf776"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_notifications_v2_endpoints_still_work
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_documentos_module.py:578: in test_notifications_v2_endpoints_still_work assert response.status_code == 200, f"Notifications v2 failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Notifications v2 failed: {"error":"Invalid or expired token","detail":"Invalid or expired token","request_id":"5469e696-a3a7-4761-83bf-1a12de983f12"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
